message:
feat(tui): cockpit overlay/expanded modes with responsive CockpitTopology (1mfw3.3.3)

Add CockpitMode enum (Overlay/Expanded) and CockpitTopology struct that
encodes per-breakpoint sizing, label style, timeline event limits, and
footer hint visibility. The render_inspector_overlay now uses topology-
driven sizing with 60% height cap for low terminals. Key 'e' toggles
between overlay and expanded modes. 11 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
